name: Jira Sync (WASM)
description: Two-way sync between Studio entities and Jira issues. Map entity types to Jira projects, track production status via Jira workflows, and auto-create issues from entity lifecycle events.
author: BiloxiStudios

jira_email.label: Jira Email
jira_email.description: Atlassian account email (for API token auth)

default_project_key.label: Default Jira Project Key
default_project_key.description: Jira project key for new issues (e.g., SBAI, PROD)

entity_type_mapping.label: Entity-to-Issue Type Mapping (JSON)
entity_type_mapping.description: JSON mapping of entity types to Jira issue types, e.g., {"character": "Story", "item": "Task", "quest": "Epic"}

status_field_mapping.label: Status Field Mapping (JSON)
status_field_mapping.description: JSON mapping of Studio production_status values to Jira transition names, e.g., {"concept": "To Do", "modeling": "In Progress", "final": "Done"}

auto_create_on_entity.label: Auto-create Issue on Entity Create
auto_create_on_entity.description: Automatically create a Jira issue when a new entity is created in Studio

auto_transition_on_status.label: Auto-transition on Status Change
auto_transition_on_status.description: Automatically transition the linked Jira issue when entity production_status changes

sync_description.label: Sync Entity Description to Issue
sync_description.description: Push entity markdown body as Jira issue description (converted to ADF)

link_field.label: Entity Link Field
link_field.description: Entity field name used to store the linked Jira issue key

labels.label: Default Labels
labels.description: Comma-separated labels to apply to created issues

bidirectional_sync.label: Bidirectional Sync (Webhook)
bidirectional_sync.description: Enable webhook listener for Jira-to-Studio sync (requires Jira webhook configuration)
